mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (username, password, email, avatar, status, email_verified, admin, last_login_time, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{email}, #{avatar}, #{status}, #{emailVerified}, #{admin}, #{lastLoginTime}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET username = #{username}, password = #{password}, email = #{email}, avatar = #{avatar}, status = #{status}, email_verified = #{emailVerified}, admin = #{admin}, last_login_time = #{lastLoginTime}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT username, last_login_time as lastLoginTime, create_time as createTime FROM user WHERE last_login_time IS NOT NULL OR create_time IS NOT NULL ORDER BY GREATEST(COALESCE(last_login_time, '1970-01-01'), COALESCE(create_time, '1970-01-01')) DESC LIMIT 10
